glosses.vi: dịch vụ; chăm sóc khách hàng
glosses.ja: サービス; 顧客サービス

sentences.target: Der Service ist heute wirklich langsam.

translations.de: Der Service ist heute wirklich langsam.
translations.en: The service is really slow today.
translations.es: El servicio está muy lento hoy.
translations.fr: Le service est vraiment lent aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Il servizio è davvero lento oggi.
translations.pt: O atendimento está muito lento hoje.
translations.vi: Dịch vụ hôm nay rất chậm.
translations.nl: De bediening is vandaag echt traag.
translations.el: Η εξυπηρέτηση σήμερα είναι πολύ αργή.
translations.nb: Servicen er veldig treg i dag.
translations.sv: Servicen är väldigt långsam i dag.
translations.da: Servicen er virkelig langsom i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はサービスがとても遅いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; determines the subject noun 'Service'.
Common noun; masculine; head of the subject noun phrase; refers to service quality.
Finite copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present); links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the state described by the predicate.
Degree/stance adverb; intensifies the following predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective; subject complement after the copula, describing the subject's state.

sentences.target: Ich finde den Service hier super.

translations.de: Ich finde den Service hier super.
translations.en: I think the service here is great.
translations.vi: Dịch vụ ở đây rất tốt.
translations.hi: यहाँ की सर्विस बहुत अच्छी है.
translations.ja: ここのサービスはとても良いです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb; finite (1st person singular present); takes a direct object and an object-related predicative complement.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; determines the direct object noun 'Service'.
Common noun; masculine; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Locative adverb; modifies the clause, indicating location/context of the evaluation.
Adjective used predicatively as an object-related complement; evaluates the direct object.

sentences.target: Im Hotel war der Service sehr freundlich.
sentences.reading: /ɪm hoːˈtɛl vaːʁ deːɐ̯ ˈzøːɐ̯vɪs zeːɐ̯ ˈfʁɔʏ̯ntlɪç/

translations.de: Im Hotel war der Service sehr freundlich.
translations.ipa: /ɪm hoːˈtɛl vaːʁ deːɐ̯ ˈzøːɐ̯vɪs zeːɐ̯ ˈfʁɔʏ̯ntlɪç/
translations.en: At the hotel, the service was very friendly.
translations.es: En el hotel, el personal fue muy amable.
translations.fr: À l'hôtel, le personnel était très aimable.
translations.it: In albergo, il personale è stato molto gentile.
translations.ru: В отеле обслуживание было очень дружелюбным.
translations.pt: No hotel, o atendimento foi muito simpático.
translations.vi: Ở khách sạn, dịch vụ rất thân thiện.
translations.ar: في الفندق كانت الخدمة ودودة جدًا.
translations.nl: In het hotel was de bediening erg vriendelijk.
translations.uk: В готелі обслуговування було дуже привітним.
translations.hu: A hotelben a kiszolgálás nagyon barátságos volt.
translations.hi: होटल में सर्विस बहुत दोस्ताना थी.
translations.pl: W hotelu obsługa była bardzo przyjazna.
translations.el: Στο ξενοδοχείο η εξυπηρέτηση ήταν πολύ φιλική.
translations.nb: På hotellet var servicen veldig vennlig.
translations.sv: På hotellet var servicen väldigt vänlig.
translations.ro: La hotel, personalul a fost foarte amabil.
translations.cs: V hotelu byla obsluha velmi přátelská.
translations.da: På hotellet var servicen meget venlig.
translations.ja: ホテルではサービスがとても親切でした。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition+article ('in dem'); introduces a locative prepositional phrase and governs dative.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'; head of the PP.
Finite copular auxiliary (3rd person singular preterite); links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Definite article; nominative singular masculine; determines the subject noun 'Service'.
Common noun; masculine; head of the subject noun phrase.
Degree adverb; intensifies the following predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective; subject complement describing 'der Service'.

sentences.target: Morgen brauche ich den Service fürs Handy.
sentences.reading: /ˈmɔʁɡən ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ɪç deːn ˈzøːɐ̯vɪs fyːɐ̯s ˈhɛndi/

translations.de: Morgen brauche ich den Service fürs Handy.
translations.ipa: /ˈmɔʁɡən ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ɪç deːn ˈzøːɐ̯vɪs fyːɐ̯s ˈhɛndi/
translations.en: Tomorrow I need the service for my phone.
translations.es: Mañana necesito llevar el móvil al servicio técnico.
translations.fr: Demain, je dois faire réparer mon téléphone.
translations.it: Domani devo portare il telefono in assistenza.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天我得把手机拿去维修。
translations.yue: 聽日我要攞部手機去整。
translations.ru: Завтра мне нужно отнести телефон в ремонт.
translations.pt: Amanhã eu preciso levar o celular para conserto.
translations.he: מחר אני צריך לקחת את הטלפון לתיקון.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi cần mang điện thoại đi sửa.
translations.ar: غدًا أحتاج أن آخذ هاتفي للتصليح.
translations.nl: Morgen moet ik mijn telefoon laten maken.
translations.uk: Завтра мені треба віднести телефон у ремонт.
translations.hu: Holnap el kell vinnem a telefonomat szervizbe.
translations.hi: कल मुझे अपना फोन सर्विस के लिए देना है.
translations.pl: Jutro muszę oddać telefon do naprawy.
translations.el: Αύριο πρέπει να πάω το κινητό για επισκευή.
translations.nb: I morgen må jeg levere telefonen til reparasjon.
translations.id: Besok saya perlu membawa ponsel untuk diperbaiki.
translations.sv: I morgon behöver jag lämna in mobilen på service.
translations.ro: Mâine trebuie să duc telefonul la service.
translations.cs: Zítra potřebuju dát telefon do servisu.
translations.da: I morgen skal jeg aflevere telefonen til reparation.
translations.fi: Huomenna minun pitää viedä puhelin huoltoon.
translations.ja: 明日、スマホを修理に出さないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate time (tomorrow).
Main verb; finite (1st person singular present); transitive, selecting an accusative direct object and a PP complement.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; determines the direct object noun 'Service'.
Common noun; masculine; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Contracted preposition+article ('für das'); introduces a prepositional phrase; governs accusative.
Common noun; neuter accusative singular; object of the preposition 'fürs'; denotes the device.
